questions.question: What famous landmark or landmark scene is shown in this image?
questions.rgb_answer: The image shows the Victoria Memorial, a large bronze statue of an angel on a pedestal, located in the Victoria Memorial Gardens in Buckingham Palace Road, Westminster, London. The memorial is situated in front of the Buckingham Palace, which is the London residence and administrative headquarters of the monarch of the United Kingdom. The statue was designed by Thomas Thornycroft and was unveiled in 1926.
